title: Injunction against harassment
doc_html:
§372.1.  Injunction against harassment

In a proceeding for divorce, a court may grant an injunction prohibiting a spouse from harassing the other spouse.

Acts 2003, No. 750, §3.

§372.1.  Injunction against harassment

Acts 2003, No. 750, §3.
